title: A few questions about that scene
display_title: A few questions about that scene
wikitext:
[]: A few questions about "that scene"             Quote Post by T. K. Simon » Thu Sep 09, 2021 7:43 am Was Asuka half conscious? Shinji finished in 28 seconds? Or the time does not go in line according to the scene (static images)? He covered his hand, why? Your thoughts?

[]: Re: A few questions about "that scene"             Quote Post by walucigi » Thu Sep 09, 2021 8:29 am 1. I think she was in a coma so yes, partially conscious. 2. They probably skipped a couple of minutes because taking time away from the rest of the movie for *this* scene is unnecessary. It's not vital to the main story so there's no need to make it longer. 3. Either the animators didn't want to animate that or Shinji just doesn't want to look at it. He seems pretty disgusted with himself after, so I would imagine the latter would be a good reason. My thoughts are basically I wish I never saw it
